title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: 小紅書前員工跨境實名舉報，傳聞中的赴港上市計劃會有變化嗎？
summary: 一名自稱是小紅書的前員工聲稱已向香港監管機構實名舉報公司或存在合規問題。學者向BBC中文分析，若涉及系統性問題，或有機會影響上市進程。

title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
summary: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
summary: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

title: DeepSeek reportedly in talks to raise $1.5B, then IPO
summary: DeepSeek, the Chinese large language model developer, is said to be preparing for a 2027 IPO debut as it also looks to raise around $1.5 billion in new funds at a $71 billion valuation.

title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
summary: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
summary: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.

title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
summary: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

title: 「越來越像一隻迷因股」：SpaceX IPO熱潮消退了嗎？
summary: SpaceX上市首月，投資者的情緒已由最初的歡慶，逐漸轉為不安。

title: Stop Over-Prompting: OpenAI’s New GPT-5.6 Guidelines Change Everything
summary: Forget the XML blocks and persistence scripts. OpenAI’s new prompting guide says define the destination, set the stopping conditions, and get out of the way.

title: Protesters March on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind Demanding AI Development Pause
summary: About 200 protesters marched through San Francisco on Saturday, calling on leading AI companies to halt development of more powerful models over concerns about AI safety, jobs, and the environment.

title: Claude's Personality Changes Depending on the Model—And the Language You Speak
summary: According to new Anthropic research, Claude consistently expresses different values across models and languages.
